title: Evidence Record
description: Validates an academic evidence record extracted from a published study, review, guideline, or authoritative source. One record per included study or source.

study_design.description: Study design classification. Use "unknown" when the design cannot be determined from the source.

population.description: Description of the study population including key demographics, health status, and sample size. Use "unknown" when not reported.

intervention.description: Description of the intervention, exposure, or comparator including dose, route, frequency, and duration. Use "unknown" when not reported.

comparator.description: Description of the comparator or control condition. Use "not_applicable" for single-arm or uncontrolled designs.

outcomes.description: Primary and relevant secondary outcomes assessed in the study.

value.description: Point estimate value as a string to preserve precision. Use "unknown" when not reported.

ci_lower.description: Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval. Use "unknown" when not reported.

ci_upper.description: Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval. Use "unknown" when not reported.

unit.description: Unit of the effect estimate. Use "not_applicable" for unitless metrics.

effect_estimates.description: Quantified effect estimates extracted from the study. Empty array if no quantitative results are available.

risk_of_bias.description: Assessed risk of bias for this study. Use "unknown" when formal assessment was not performed or information is insufficient.

population_match.description: Degree to which the study population matches the target population.

dose_match.description: Degree to which the study dose matches the target product dose. Use "not_applicable" for non-intervention studies.

formulation_match.description: Degree to which the study formulation matches the target product formulation. Use "not_applicable" when formulation is not relevant.

outcome_match.description: Degree to which the study outcomes match the claimed or questioned outcomes.

applicability.description: Applicability assessment evaluating how well the study matches the target product, population, and context.

sample_size.description: Total sample size or number of participants. Use "unknown" when not reported.

duration.description: Study duration or follow-up period. Use "unknown" when not reported.

adverse_events.description: Summary of adverse events reported. Use "unknown" when not reported; "not_applicable" when safety was not assessed.

funding.description: Funding source. Use "unknown" when not reported.

conflicts_of_interest.description: Declared conflicts of interest. Use "unknown" when not reported.

limitations.description: Study limitations noted by the authors or reviewer. Use "unknown" when not assessed.

extractor_notes.description: Reviewer notes about extraction quality, ambiguity, or data-access issues.
